text.title: Claude API Basics Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to wire an Anthropic SDK client to production-grade auth, retry, cost tracking, and request-id logging.

step.name: Load API key from env.
step.description: Input: secrets manager / `.env`. Action: ensure `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is exported in the runtime; refuse to start if missing. Output: env var present.

step.name: Pin the model id.
step.description: Input: workload routing table. Action: pick exactly one of {Haiku, Sonnet, Opus} per task; write the full-date id into config; reject alias-only strings. Output: pinned `model_id`.
step.note: Step 2. Required input: workload routing table.

step.name: Wire the retry decorator.
step.description: Input: tenacity dependency. Action: install the decorator from `templates/retry-wrapper.py`; verify it covers `RateLimitError`, `APIStatusError` with 5xx + 529, and `APIConnectionError`. Output: decorator applied to every call site.

step.name: Install the cost tracker.
step.description: Input: latest Anthropic price sheet. Action: bind `CostTracker` (from `templates/cost-tracker.py`) to the client wrapper; key the price table off `response.model`; track input, output, cache write, cache read. Output: cost tracker emitting per-call cost.

step.name: Capture `x-request-id`.
step.description: Input: SDK access to raw response headers. Action: capture `x-request-id` on every call; attach to every log line and error event. Output: `request_id_logged=true`.
step.note: Step 5. Required input: SDK header accessor.

step.name: Validate.
step.description: Input: assembled output JSON. Action: run `scripts/validate-claude-api-basics.py` against the produced config; smoke-test by issuing one live call and inspecting `response.model + response.usage`. Output: green validator + non-zero token counters.
